name: Garlic Mushroom Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Grated Swiss or Mozzarella cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the large mushrooms and discard the ends.
2. Remove the stems from all mushrooms and chop them together with the small mushrooms.
3. In a skillet, sauté the garlic, chopped mushrooms, and almonds in half the butter until well done.
4. Add the ground beef to the skillet and cook until fully cooked.
5. Stir in the bread crumbs and mix thoroughly.
6. Arrange 8 large mushrooms in the greased casserole dish with their open sides up.
7. Press the sautéed mixture over the mushrooms.
8. Cover the top layer of sautéed mixture with another 8 large mushrooms placed open side down.
9. Sprinkle grated Swiss or Mozzarella cheese, remaining bread crumbs, and Parmesan cheese evenly on top.
10. Dot the remaining half of the butter over the casserole.
11. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until the mushrooms are tender.
Yield: 8 servings
Note: You can substitute ground meat with soy paste. For added moisture, use an extra 1/2 lb of butter.
